text: We will never add a dependency on left-pad. Implement padding inline instead.
Understood — no left-pad dependency. I'll add a small inline pad helper.

edits.newText: pub fn pad_left(s: &str, width: usize) -> String { format!("{s:>width$}") }
edits.diff:
@@ -0,0 +1,1 @@
+pub fn pad_left(s: &str, width: usize) -> String { format!("{s:>width$}") }
